title: Poor Oral Hygiene and Periodontal Disease: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for a Solution
description: Thymus vulgaris essential oils, also known as thyme oil, has been studied for its potential benefits in treating periodontal disease. This is due to its antimicrobial properties, which help combat the bacteria that cause the condition. Thyme oil contains compounds like thymol and carvacrol, which have been shown to be effective against various types of bacteria, including those responsible for periodontitis.
